steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The equation $d = 9t + 185$ is linear. The slope 9 means distance increases by 9 feet for every 1 minute elapsed.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The starting value $185$ is not part of the increase over the 25-minute interval; it is only the initial distance at $t=0$. The increase is the rate times time, $9(25)=225$, so C is correct.
